name: 美女公寓
short_description: During the holidays, my parents went out and I stayed alone in the apartment. There are many beautiful girls living in the apartment. Give them gifts to strengthen our relationship.
detailed_description:
Game Introduction: 

Experience wandering around the beautiful apartment.

Use 10 days to break through relationships with various sisters.

During the holiday, my parents went out and I stayed alone in the apartment. There is a supermarket on the first floor of the apartment, and a migrant worker serves as the cashier. There is a socialite who likes pink colors and a single mother living on the second floor. There is a middle-aged couple living on the third floor. The man often drinks and likes to go to Zhou Bian Restaurant and tavern to drink and consume, often not coming home. There is also a white-collar lady on the third floor who likes to wear loose pajamas. You usually know each other but don't have much contact. Whether you can establish a new relationship with them while you are alone at home this time depends entirely on how you operate!

Gameplay:

Earn money by massaging NPCs, use the earned money to give gifts, and unlock to achieve a close friend ending after the 10 day vacation.

Perfect ending: All 5 sisters achieved 5 ♥ Favorability.

This is a game designed to experience interacting with young ladies in an apartment. During the holiday, you can freely shuttle around the apartment you are staying in, visit the residents inside the building, interact with them or give them gifts, and gain their favor. Experience a journey of interaction with apartment residents.

Utilize 10 days of gaming time to achieve a close friendship achievement ending with different sisters.

This is an apartment experience simulator that allows you to experience interactions with various residents in the apartment and experience the process of such interactions.

Any Problems Please Contact：wlapsuywhadlaoapaos@gmail.com
